description: Lightweight firmware package for TI MSPM0G3507 development, including device documentation, DriverLib, TI Drivers, FreeRTOS files, SysConfig-based TI examples, and ZF wrapper examples.
rules: Treat .syscfg files as the source of truth for generated MSPM0 pin, clock, interrupt, and peripheral configuration when present.
Use generated ti_msp_dl_config.h macro names exactly as written; do not invent GPIO, clock, IRQ, timer, UART, SPI, I2C, ADC, or DMA symbols.
Prefer TI DriverLib, TI Drivers, and local ZF wrapper APIs over ad hoc register access in examples and explanations.
Use include/ for public interfaces and source/ for implementation details; keep paired headers and sources consistent.
Use doc/MSPM0G3507 LQFP-48 引脚功能表.md and doc/MSPM0G3507 LQFP-64 引脚功能表.md for package-specific pin mapping notes.
Use TI_examples for LP-MSPM0G3507 SysConfig and DriverLib reference patterns, and use ZF_examples for ZF board wrapper usage patterns.
Do not treat generated build outputs, object files, map files, binaries, IDE metadata, or version-control metadata as source documentation.
When summarizing C/C++ APIs, preserve exact macro names, function names, interrupt names, device identifiers, and package names.
For embedded C edits, keep ISR work short, avoid unnecessary RAM use, and keep configuration constants in headers or SysConfig.
